title: Oct2020: PREPARE DDL statement silently fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INT, value FLOAT CHECK (value >= 0), FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Test Entry');
INSERT INTO another_table (ref_id, value) VALUES (1, NULL);
CREATE TABLE failed_table AS SELECT * FROM another_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
